mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recent_recommendations (user_id, item_id, category, label, recommendation_text, forgetting_score, received_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, #{category}, #{label}, #{recommendationText}, #{forgettingScore}, now()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, item_id) DO UPDATE SET category = EXCLUDED.category, label = EXCLUDED.label, recommendation_text = EXCLUDED.recommendation_text, forgetting_score = EXCLUDED.forgetting_score, received_at = now()
